claim_boundary.next_gate: Run a zero-credit B7 ledger retest boundary before any promotion.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: R65 does not close O3, prove a general circuit optimization theorem, allow reroute, or grant B7/STV/resource-ledger promotion.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: R65 reruns the same-access denominator verifier for all 8 accepted R63/R64 rows and confirms stable semantic replay digests, file hash bindings, zero denominator distances, rejected negative controls, and no forbidden input usage.
